name: Vertex Inc. Tax Technology API
what_it_does: Vertex Inc. REST API for enterprise indirect tax automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage sales and use tax calculation in real-time for transactions, handle VAT and GST calculation for international transactions, access tax content database and jurisdiction management, retrieve exemption certificate management and validation, manage taxability determination for products and services, handle tax return preparation and filing data, access tax analytics and reporting data, retrieve nexus management and economic nexus tracking, manage ERP tax calculation integration (SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics), and integrate real-time tax calculation with e-commerce and order management systems.
use_cases: Calculating real-time sales tax for transactions from order processing agents
Managing VAT and international tax from global commerce agents
Validating exemption certificates from AP automation agents
Integrating tax calculation with SAP from ERP finance agents
not_for: Income tax and corporate tax without indirect tax focus
Small business sales tax without enterprise ERP integration requirements
Simple US-only tax calculation without multi-jurisdiction complexity
best_when: An enterprise using Vertex Inc. wants AI agents to automate real-time tax calculation, exemption management, nexus monitoring, tax return data preparation, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: TAX+COMPLIANCE RISK: Tax calculation automation must stay current with jurisdiction rule changes — stale tax rate data causes incorrect calculations with audit liability. Exemption certificate automation must validate certificate expiry and completeness. Nexus determination errors can create tax registration obligations.

auth.notes: Vertex uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Vertex O Series and Vertex Cloud have separate APIs. Developer documentation at developer.vertexsmb.com. No native webhooks. ERP connectors for SAP, Oracle, and Microsoft Dynamics. SOAP (O Series legacy) and REST API available. Strong ERP integration partnerships.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; pricing based on transaction volume and ERP modules
pricing.notes: King of Prussia, Pennsylvania. Founded 1978. NASDAQ: VRTX. Enterprise tax technology leader. $700M+ annual revenue. 4,000+ enterprise clients. Strong SAP and Oracle integration partnerships. Vertex O Series (on-premises) and Vertex Cloud (SaaS). 125+ countries for VAT/GST. Competes with Avalara and ONESOURCE for enterprise indirect tax.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per subscription; high-volume ERP transaction processing optimized

known_agent_gotchas: TAX RISK: Tax rule updates — Vertex updates tax content regularly; ensure automation uses current content not cached rates
O Series vs Vertex Cloud separate APIs — on-premises O Series and Cloud APIs differ; verify deployment
SOAP legacy for O Series — older O Series deployments use SOAP API; REST available for Cloud
No native webhooks — poll for tax content updates and certificate changes
Enterprise licensing and ERP connectors — production access requires commercial relationship and ERP connector licensing
No public MCP server — REST/SOAP API via developer portal requiring enterprise account
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise tax technology. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Tax transaction data and exemption certificates.

security_score_components.security_notes: Tax technology. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Tax transaction and compliance data.
